key.name: output-1
key.description: The first audio output device to toggle between

key.name: output-2
key.description: The second audio output device to toggle between

key.name: indicator-icon-1
key.description: Icon to display when output 1 is active (headphones, desktop-speakers, large-speakers, earbuds)

key.name: indicator-icon-2
key.description: Icon to display when output 2 is active (headphones, desktop-speakers, large-speakers, earbuds)

key.name: show-in-tray
key.description: Whether to show the toggle button in system tray (requires AppIndicator extension)

key.name: show-in-quick-settings
key.description: Whether to show the toggle button in quick settings panel

key.name: show-system-indicator
key.description: Whether to show an audio switcher icon in the top panel (next to system icons)
